titleStmt.title: SII 9.114: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 114. (A.R. No. 561 of 1915.) ON A SLAB SET UP IN THE COURT-YARD OF THE BHOGESVARA TEMPLE AT KAMMARCHODU, ALUR TALUK, SAME DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 976, Jaya, Pushya, śu. 13, Ādivāra, Uttarāyaṇa-saṁkrānti, Sōmagrahaṇa. The date is irregular; Pushya śu. 13 in Jaya fell on A.D. 1054 December 15, Thursday (not Sunday) Uttarāyaṇa-saṅkrānti falling on December 24, Saturday. There was no lunar eclipse. The record refers itself to the reign of the Chālukya king Trailōkyamalladēva and mentions his feudatory Vīra-Noḷamba Gaṭṭidēva “lord of Kāñchī” as ruling over Sindavāḍi thousand. It records that, at the request of some Gāvuṇḍas, the Noḷamba chief made a grant of some land for the service of the gods Mūlasthānadēva and Bhōgēśvaradēva. The grant was made while the Noḷamba chief was in the camp of Kampili. The writer was Brahmēśvarajīya, head of a maṭha.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . samastabhuvanāśraya
śrīpṛthvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja paramē
svara paramabhaṭṭāraka satyāśrayakuḷatiḷaka cā
ḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmattraiḷōkyamalladēvara vijaya
rājyamuttarōttarābhivṛddhipravarddhamānamācaṁ
drārkatārambaraṁ saluttamire svasti samadhigatapaṁcamahā
sabda pallavānvaya pallavakuḷatiḷakaṁ kāṁcīpuravarēsvaraṁ
śrīmanumahāmaṁḍaḷēsvaraṁ vīranoḷaṁba gaṭṭidēva siṁ
davāḍi sāyiramumaṁ sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadinā
ḷuttamire sakavariṣa 976 neya jayasaṁvatsara
da puṣya suddha 13 Ādivāra Uttarāyaṇasaṁkrāṁ
ti sōmagrahaṇadaṁdu kammāṟaceṟunina caṭṭa
gāvuṇḍa piriyanāmagāvuṇḍa mācigāvuṇḍa Ā
cagāvuṇḍa cāvuṇḍagāvuṇḍa tikkalagāvuṇḍa rudramāra
cikkagāvuṇḍa kētagāvuṇḍa Intī ra binnapadiṁ kaṁ
piliya nelevīḍina dakṣiṇagaṁgeya taḍiyaliḻdu
dhārāpūrvvakammāḍi mūlasthānadēvargge biṭṭa kariyane
la mattaru 12 bhōgēsvaradēvargge biṭṭa kariyane
la mattaru 12 . I dharmma Ārorvvaru pratipāḷisida
ḍe Aśvamēdhayajñaṁgeyda phalamakku svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā
yō harēti vasuṁdharāṁ . ṣaṣṭirvvarṣasahaśrāṇi viṣṭā
yāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ . maṭhadācāryya brahmēsvarajī
yara sīgralikita .
Digital edition of SII 9.114 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
